description: Clear lead inquiry with full info and property reference

msg.subject: Interested in 42 Oak Street listing
msg.body: Hi, I saw your listing at 42 Oak Street on Realtor.ca. Is it still available? We are pre-approved and looking to buy in the next 2-3 months. Please call me at 416-555-0101. Thanks, John
msg.snippet: I saw your listing at 42 Oak Street

expected_classification.name: John Smith
expected_classification.inquiryMessage: Interested in 42 Oak Street listing, pre-approved, buying in 2-3 months
expected_classification.reasoning: Real person with clear buying intent and property reference

msg.subject: Looking to buy a home in Toronto
msg.body: Hello, Mike Chen recommended you. We are first-time buyers looking in the Beaches area. When can we chat?

expected_classification.name: Maria Garcia
expected_classification.inquiryMessage: First-time buyers looking in the Beaches area, referred by Mike Chen

description: Forwarded referral - neighbor wants to sell

msg.subject: Referral - my neighbor wants to sell
msg.body: Hi Sarah, my neighbor at 100 Maple Ave is thinking about listing. Her name is Linda Park, email linda@gmail.com. She has been in the house 25 years. I thought you would be a great fit. Tom

expected_classification.name: Tom Wilson
expected_classification.inquiryMessage: Neighbor at 100 Maple Ave wants to sell
expected_classification.reasoning: Forwarded referral with clear selling intent

msg.subject: Closing documents for 55 Park Blvd
msg.body: Dear Sarah, please find attached the executed Agreement of Purchase and Sale for the property at 55 Park Blvd. Closing is set for November 30. Please confirm receipt. James Patel, Patel and Associates
msg.snippet: executed Agreement of Purchase and Sale

description: Fellow real estate agent co-rep inquiry

msg.subject: Co-rep inquiry for your listing at 210 Queen St
msg.body: Hi Sarah, I am Kevin with RE/MAX. I have a buyer interested in your listing at 210 Queen St. Would you be open to a co-rep arrangement? Let me know. Kevin Li, RE/MAX

msg.subject: Pre-approval letter for your client David Kim
msg.body: Hi Sarah, please find attached the pre-approval letter for David Kim for $850,000. This is valid for 90 days. Let me know if you need anything else. Amanda Clarke, TD Mortgage Specialist

expected_classification.name: Amanda Clarke
expected_classification.reasoning: Mortgage broker sending client pre-approval letter

msg.subject: New listings matching your saved search - 5 properties found
msg.body: Based on your saved search criteria, here are 5 new listings. Property 1: 42 Elm St - $799K. Property 2: 18 Birch Ave - $650K. Update your search preferences. Unsubscribe.
msg.snippet: 5 new listings matching your saved search

expected_classification.reasoning: Automated listing alert newsletter with unsubscribe link

description: Google Calendar invite - blocked by calendar domain rule

msg.body: You have been invited to: Showing at 42 Oak St on Thursday November 30 at 10am. Accept or Decline.

description: Reply to existing thread - blocked by inReplyTo rule

msg.subject: Re: Properties in Rosedale
msg.body: Yes that sounds good, Tuesday works for me. See you then!

description: Ambiguous outreach from property management company - defaults to business_correspondence

msg.subject: Question about your services
msg.body: Hello, we are a property management company and wanted to reach out to discuss a potential referral partnership. Let us know if you are interested.

expected_classification.reasoning: Property management company seeking partnership, ambiguous but not a personal lead

description: LinkedIn connection notification - clear noise (second noise fixture)

msg.subject: You have a new connection on LinkedIn
msg.body: Your network is growing! David Kim accepted your invitation to connect on LinkedIn. Message David or view their profile. Manage notifications. Unsubscribe from these emails.
msg.snippet: David Kim accepted your invitation to connect

expected_classification.reasoning: Automated LinkedIn social notification with unsubscribe link, no real estate relevance

description: ShowingTime automated showing request - looks like noise but confidence < 0.85 so falls through to business_correspondence

msg.subject: New Showing Request - 42 Oak Street - Sat Nov 25 2:00 PM
msg.body: A showing has been requested for your listing at 42 Oak Street. Date: Saturday November 25 at 2:00 PM. Requesting agent: Kevin Brown, RE/MAX City Realty. Please confirm or decline within 2 hours. Log in to ShowingTime to manage this request.
msg.snippet: New showing request for 42 Oak Street

expected_classification.reasoning: Automated showing platform notification but contains real actionable request from another agent; noise confidence falls below 0.85 threshold so classified as business_correspondence

description: Lead with substantive subject but empty body - passes pre-filter (subject is not short)

msg.snippet: Interested in buying in the Annex area
